allow: Bash(python -c "import py_compile; py_compile.compile\(''worker/main.py'', doraise=True\); print\(''Syntax OK''\)")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm --name spb_test_run spb_worker:latest python worker/main.py)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm --entrypoint python spb_worker:latest -c "import sys; print\(sys.executable\); print\(sys.version\)")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm --entrypoint python spb_worker:latest -m pip list)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm --entrypoint pip spb_worker:latest list)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm --name spb_smoke_test -e ACCOUNT_ID=test spb_worker:latest timeout 5 python worker/main.py)

Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('worker/main.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); ast.parse\(open\('backend/docker_manager.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); ast.parse\(open\('app.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('OK'\)")
